summary: SINGLE_FOCUS: sign of dot product reveals angle. BLUE v=(2, 0) fixed; ORANGE w=2.2(cos θ, sin θ) with ValueTracker theta_tr sweeping 0→π. always_redraw w arrow + YELLOW angle arc. Live θ°, v·w with color (GREEN acute / YELLOW perp / RED obtuse) + dynamic label 'acute/perpendicular/obtuse'.
